data.name: 4 Kingdoms Supremacy
data.detailed_description:
You are the son of a powerful warrior who defeated a tyrannical king and unified all kingdoms under a single law. When you were just a baby, your home was destroyed by a dragon sent by an evil sorceress and your parents died to protect you. You were found in the ashes by a group of barbarians who saved you and raised you as one of their own. After his father's death, internecine wars began and the once unified kingdom fractured. It is your mission to discover its real origins, destroy the malevolent sorceress and conquer supremacy of the 4 kingdoms, unifying them once again under your power.

But don't worry, you don't have to do this alone. During your gameplay you will always be accompanied by beautiful girls and partners from your tribe who will help you face the challenges that lie ahead. And in the midst of all this chaos and destruction, you will also have a good time where you can have fun and relax.

So, do you have what it takes to conquer supremacy of the 4 kingdoms?

This game is a Visual Novel based on static images and short animations. The entire course of the story and interactions with other characters will depend on the choices you make during the game.

data.short_description: You are the son of a fallen king and have been raised by barbarians since you were a baby. Your mission is to end tyranny and conquer supremacy of the 4 kingdoms.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • Processor: Dual Core or better
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
